title: (Bullish Signal) SBLK, Stochastic Oscillator left the oversold zone on April 07, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a signal that SBLK's price trend could be reversing, and it may be an opportunity to buy the stock or explore call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor identified 60 similar cases where SBLK's stochastic oscillator exited the oversold zone, and 52 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 87%. Current price $14.51 crossed the support line at $14.45 and is trading between $17.27 resistance and $14.45 support lines. Throughout the month of 03/05/21 - 04/07/21, the price experienced a +8% Uptrend, while the week of 03/30/21 - 04/07/21 shows a -2% Downtrend.

https://preview.redd.it/br77hdvclzr61.png?width=1438&format=png&auto=webp&s=bdd90b8f794a5cbaaf069dc2bea22c6fedab6c66

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator suggests the stock price trend may be in a reversal from a downward trend to an upward trend. 52 of 60 cases where SBLK's Stochastic Oscillator exited the oversold zone resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 87%.

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on April 07, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on SBLK as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 79 of 89 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 89%.

SBLK moved above its 50-day Moving Average on November 09, 2020 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

The 10-day Moving Average for SBLK crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on November 17, 2020. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 10 of 16 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 63%.

Following a +3.31% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where SBLK advanced for three days, in 245 of 294 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 83%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 188 of 247 cases where SBLK Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 76%.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/10472095-star-bulk-carriers-s-sblk-14-69-stochastic-oscillator-left-the-oversold-zone-on-april-07-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
